variables.name: src_workspace_id
variables.note: Workspace the bronze source tables live in (read side); per-developer value sets typically point this at the shared TEST workspace

variables.name: lh_silver
variables.note: Replace with the real Lakehouse GUID from the workspace after the first git sync

variables.name: lh_gold
variables.note: Replace with the real Lakehouse GUID from the workspace after the first git sync

variables.name: key_vault_url
variables.note: Azure Key Vault used by NB_dlt_runner to resolve `keyvault_secret` references in a source config's auth block (client secrets, API keys, ...). notebookutils.credentials.getSecret authenticates as whoever/whatever is running the notebook (the signed-in user for a manual run) — that identity needs 'Get' permission on the vault's secrets (Key Vault Secrets User role, for RBAC-mode vaults).
